mapper.sql: id , conversation_type, scene_type, name, avatar, owner_id, single_pair_key, visibility_scope, allow_guest_view, require_join_to_speak, join_rule, speak_level_limit, member_limit, is_all_site, all_site_key, status, remark, announcement, slow_mode_seconds, display_sort, channel_category_code, last_message_id, last_message_time, created_at, updated_at

from chat_conversation c inner join chat_conversation_member cm on cm.conversation_id = c.id and cm.user_id = #{userId} and cm.status = 1 left join chat_message_read_cursor cursor on cursor.conversation_id = c.id and cursor.user_id = #{userId} left join chat_message lm on lm.id = c.last_message_id where c.status = 1
and ( c.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or lm.content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
mapper.select:
select c.id, c.conversation_type as conversationType, c.scene_type as sceneType, c.name, c.avatar, c.owner_id as ownerId, c.announcement as notice, c.is_all_site as isAllSite, c.status, c.visibility_scope as visibilityScope, c.allow_guest_view as allowGuestView, c.require_join_to_speak as requireJoinToSpeak, c.join_rule as joinRule, c.speak_level_limit as speakLevelLimit, c.member_limit as memberLimit, c.slow_mode_seconds as slowModeSeconds, c.display_sort as displaySort, c.channel_category_code as channelCategoryCode, cm.member_role as selfRole, cursor.read_message_id as lastReadMessageId, cursor.read_at as lastReadAt, cursor.delivered_message_id as lastDeliveredMessageId, cursor.delivered_at as lastDeliveredAt, cursor.unread_count as unreadCount, c.last_message_id as lastMessageId, lm.message_type as lastMessageType, lm.content as lastMessageContent, lm.sender_id as lastMessageSenderId, c.last_message_time as lastMessageTime, c.created_at as createdAt, c.updated_at as updatedAt
order by coalesce(c.last_message_time, c.updated_at) desc, c.id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}

select c.id, c.conversation_type as conversationType, c.scene_type as sceneType, c.name, c.avatar, c.owner_id as ownerId, c.announcement as notice, c.is_all_site as isAllSite, c.status, c.visibility_scope as visibilityScope, c.allow_guest_view as allowGuestView, c.require_join_to_speak as requireJoinToSpeak, c.join_rule as joinRule, c.speak_level_limit as speakLevelLimit, c.member_limit as memberLimit, c.slow_mode_seconds as slowModeSeconds, c.display_sort as displaySort, c.channel_category_code as channelCategoryCode, cm.member_role as selfRole, cursor.read_message_id as lastReadMessageId, cursor.read_at as lastReadAt, cursor.delivered_message_id as lastDeliveredMessageId, cursor.delivered_at as lastDeliveredAt, cursor.unread_count as unreadCount, c.last_message_id as lastMessageId, lm.message_type as lastMessageType, lm.content as lastMessageContent, lm.sender_id as lastMessageSenderId, c.last_message_time as lastMessageTime, c.created_at as createdAt, c.updated_at as updatedAt
and c.id = #{conversationId} limit 1

select c.id, c.conversation_type as conversationType, c.scene_type as sceneType, c.name, c.avatar, c.owner_id as ownerId, c.remark as description, c.announcement as notice, c.is_all_site as isAllSite, c.status, c.visibility_scope as visibilityScope, c.allow_guest_view as allowGuestView, c.require_join_to_speak as requireJoinToSpeak, c.join_rule as joinRule, c.speak_level_limit as speakLevelLimit, c.member_limit as memberLimit, c.slow_mode_seconds as slowModeSeconds, c.display_sort as displaySort, c.channel_category_code as channelCategoryCode, cm_self.member_role as selfRole, coalesce(member_stats.member_count, 0) as memberCount, c.created_at as createdAt, c.updated_at as updatedAt
order by c.display_sort desc, c.updated_at desc, c.id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}

select c.id, c.conversation_type as conversationType, c.scene_type as sceneType, c.name, c.avatar, c.owner_id as ownerId, c.announcement as notice, c.is_all_site as isAllSite, c.status, c.visibility_scope as visibilityScope, c.allow_guest_view as allowGuestView, c.require_join_to_speak as requireJoinToSpeak, c.join_rule as joinRule, c.speak_level_limit as speakLevelLimit, c.member_limit as memberLimit, c.slow_mode_seconds as slowModeSeconds, c.display_sort as displaySort, c.channel_category_code as channelCategoryCode, coalesce(member_stats.member_count, 0) as memberCount, c.last_message_id as lastMessageId, lm.message_type as lastMessageType, lm.content as lastMessageContent, lm.sender_id as lastMessageSenderId, c.last_message_time as lastMessageTime, c.created_at as createdAt, c.updated_at as updatedAt
order by coalesce(c.last_message_time, c.updated_at) desc, c.id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}

select c.id, c.conversation_type as conversationType, c.scene_type as sceneType, c.name, c.avatar, c.owner_id as ownerId, c.announcement as notice, c.is_all_site as isAllSite, c.status, c.visibility_scope as visibilityScope, c.allow_guest_view as allowGuestView, c.require_join_to_speak as requireJoinToSpeak, c.join_rule as joinRule, c.speak_level_limit as speakLevelLimit, c.member_limit as memberLimit, c.slow_mode_seconds as slowModeSeconds, c.display_sort as displaySort, c.channel_category_code as channelCategoryCode, (select count(1) from chat_conversation_member cm where cm.conversation_id = c.id and cm.status = 1) as memberCount, c.last_message_id as lastMessageId, lm.message_type as lastMessageType, lm.content as lastMessageContent, lm.sender_id as lastMessageSenderId, c.last_message_time as lastMessageTime, c.created_at as createdAt, c.updated_at as updatedAt from chat_conversation c left join chat_message lm on lm.id = c.last_message_id where c.id = #{conversationId} limit 1
